title: Greenroom MVP: Backstage-native catalog foundation
goal: Implement native Backstage catalog support as the Greenroom core model.

acceptanceCriteria.text: A run can be scaffolded from this backlog item
peek returns HAS_WORK until the next step is finished
finish records structured output and advances state

nextStep: Implement native Backstage catalog support as the Greenroom core model. Support catalog-info.yaml, Backstage envelope (apiVersion/kind/metadata/spec), entity refs, and core kinds for MVP: Component, API, System, Resource, Domain, Location. Treat relations as derived from Backstage semantics, not custom relationship fields.
